Steps23
Final steps for Best UI
+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

step22_to_hr_quick_buttons_all_in_one_final.sh


#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -Eeuo pipefail
export AWS_PAGER=""

PROJECT_DIR="$HOME/opsai-assistant-aws"
ENV_FILE="$PROJECT_DIR/.env"
TEMP_DIR=""

show_error() {
  local line_number="$1"
  local exit_code="$2"

  echo
  echo "============================================================"
  echo "ERROR: Final Step 22 installation stopped."
  echo "Line: $line_number"
  echo "Exit code: $exit_code"
  echo "============================================================"
  echo
  echo "Review the last displayed error. Existing backups were retained."
}

trap 'show_error "$LINENO" "$?"' ERR

cleanup() {
  if [[ -n "${TEMP_DIR:-}" && -d "$TEMP_DIR" ]]; then
    rm -rf "$TEMP_DIR"
  fi
}

trap cleanup EXIT

echo "============================================================"
echo " OpsAI Step 22 - Complete Final HR Portal and UI Installation"
echo "============================================================"
echo
echo "This is one complete upload-and-run file."
echo
echo "It performs these final phases:"
echo "  1. Rebuild the complete Internal HR Portal"
echo "  2. Add Candidate View and Manager View"
echo "  3. Add 10 managers, 20 jobs, 40 candidates and 40 applications"
echo "  4. Add all 17 hiring workflow stages and manager actions"
echo "  5. Add robot, AI, infrastructure, HR and approval images"
echo "  6. Apply the modern visual theme and UI stability corrections"
echo "  7. Add home feature cards, status indicators and thinking animation"
echo "  8. Remove the large world map"
echo "  9. Add the supplied globe photograph on the right side"
echo " 10. Fix both HR quick buttons so they open HR Portal searches"
echo " 11. Validate and deploy the final website to AWS Amplify"
echo

if [[ ! -d "$PROJECT_DIR" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Project directory was not found:"
  echo "  $PROJECT_DIR"
  exit 1
fi

if [[ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Environment file was not found:"
  echo "  $ENV_FILE"
  exit 1
fi

for command_name in \
  aws \
  bash \
  base64 \
  curl \
  grep \
  node \
  python3 \
  sha256sum \
  unzip \
  zip
do
  if ! command -v "$command_name" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "ERROR: Required command is not available: $command_name"
    exit 1
  fi
done

echo "Checking the current AWS identity..."
aws sts get-caller-identity --output table

set -a
source "$ENV_FILE"
set +a

AWS_REGION="${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1}"
AWS_DEFAULT_REGION="${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION:-$AWS_REGION}"
export AWS_REGION AWS_DEFAULT_REGION

echo
echo "Project: $PROJECT_DIR"
echo "Region:  $AWS_REGION"
echo

TEMP_DIR="$(mktemp -d "$HOME/.opsai-step22-final.XXXXXX")"
chmod 700 "$TEMP_DIR"

echo "Preparing the embedded final scripts..."

cat > "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_hr_portal_and_final_ui.sh.b64" <<'OPSAI_PAYLOAD_01_EOF'

OPSAI_PAYLOAD_01_EOF

base64 --decode   "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_hr_portal_and_final_ui.sh.b64"   > "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_hr_portal_and_final_ui.sh"

rm -f "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_hr_portal_and_final_ui.sh.b64"
chmod 700 "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_hr_portal_and_final_ui.sh"

EXPECTED_SHA256="dc77785eea79ac40876472c28d63e9a830080cf8f068a419932ebd7ffce518dd"
ACTUAL_SHA256="$(sha256sum "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_hr_portal_and_final_ui.sh" | awk '{print $1}')"

if [[ "$ACTUAL_SHA256" != "$EXPECTED_SHA256" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Integrity validation failed for 01_step22_complete_hr_portal_and_final_ui.sh."
  exit 1
fi

bash -n "$TEMP_DIR/01_step22_complete_hr_portal_and_final_ui.sh"
echo "Validated: 01_step22_complete_hr_portal_and_final_ui.sh"

cat > "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_home_screen_enhancements.sh.b64" <<'OPSAI_PAYLOAD_02_EOF'

OPSAI_PAYLOAD_02_EOF

base64 --decode   "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_home_screen_enhancements.sh.b64"   > "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_home_screen_enhancements.sh"

rm -f "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_home_screen_enhancements.sh.b64"
chmod 700 "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_home_screen_enhancements.sh"

EXPECTED_SHA256="23870586e11829df726508dc09f9fc40514944774ec560bb546fd8b9d5487c42"
ACTUAL_SHA256="$(sha256sum "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_home_screen_enhancements.sh" | awk '{print $1}')"

if [[ "$ACTUAL_SHA256" != "$EXPECTED_SHA256" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Integrity validation failed for 02_add_home_screen_enhancements.sh."
  exit 1
fi

bash -n "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_home_screen_enhancements.sh"
echo "Validated: 02_add_home_screen_enhancements.sh"

cat > "$TEMP_DIR/03_replace_map_with_right_side_globe.sh.b64" <<'OPSAI_PAYLOAD_03_EOF'

OPSAI_PAYLOAD_03_EOF

base64 --decode   "$TEMP_DIR/03_replace_map_with_right_side_globe.sh.b64"   > "$TEMP_DIR/03_replace_map_with_right_side_globe.sh"

rm -f "$TEMP_DIR/03_replace_map_with_right_side_globe.sh.b64"
chmod 700 "$TEMP_DIR/03_replace_map_with_right_side_globe.sh"

EXPECTED_SHA256="d9f8f8c502fe0453956ed2b5dce014e569ef53035fb7c09ec0b366690231b65a"
ACTUAL_SHA256="$(sha256sum "$TEMP_DIR/03_replace_map_with_right_side_globe.sh" | awk '{print $1}')"

if [[ "$ACTUAL_SHA256" != "$EXPECTED_SHA256" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Integrity validation failed for 03_replace_map_with_right_side_globe.sh."
  exit 1
fi

bash -n "$TEMP_DIR/03_replace_map_with_right_side_globe.sh"
echo "Validated: 03_replace_map_with_right_side_globe.sh"

cat > "$TEMP_DIR/04_fix_hr_quick_buttons.sh.b64" <<'OPSAI_PAYLOAD_04_EOF'

OPSAI_PAYLOAD_04_EOF

base64 --decode   "$TEMP_DIR/04_fix_hr_quick_buttons.sh.b64"   > "$TEMP_DIR/04_fix_hr_quick_buttons.sh"

rm -f "$TEMP_DIR/04_fix_hr_quick_buttons.sh.b64"
chmod 700 "$TEMP_DIR/04_fix_hr_quick_buttons.sh"

EXPECTED_SHA256="7f0158777258238173a262728bce30fd54d198f85acb545fde3106e0cc6e50bf"
ACTUAL_SHA256="$(sha256sum "$TEMP_DIR/04_fix_hr_quick_buttons.sh" | awk '{print $1}')"

if [[ "$ACTUAL_SHA256" != "$EXPECTED_SHA256" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Integrity validation failed for 04_fix_hr_quick_buttons.sh."
  exit 1
fi

bash -n "$TEMP_DIR/04_fix_hr_quick_buttons.sh"
echo "Validated: 04_fix_hr_quick_buttons.sh"

echo
echo "All embedded scripts passed syntax and integrity checks."

run_phase() {
  local phase_number="$1"
  local phase_title="$2"
  local script_name="$3"

  echo
  echo "============================================================"
  echo " Phase ${phase_number} of 4"
  echo " ${phase_title}"
  echo "============================================================"
  echo

  bash "$TEMP_DIR/$script_name"

  echo
  echo "Phase ${phase_number} completed successfully."
}

run_phase \
  "1" \
  "Rebuild the complete HR Portal and final stable visual UI" \
  "01_step22_complete_hr_portal_and_final_ui.sh"

run_phase \
  "2" \
  "Add the final home-screen enhancements" \
  "02_add_home_screen_enhancements.sh"

run_phase \
  "3" \
  "Remove the large map and add the right-side globe" \
  "03_replace_map_with_right_side_globe.sh"

run_phase \
  "4" \
  "Fix the two HR Portal quick buttons" \
  "04_fix_hr_quick_buttons.sh"

echo
echo "============================================================"
echo " Final validation"
echo "============================================================"
echo

cd "$PROJECT_DIR"
WEB_DIR="$PROJECT_DIR/app/web"

required_files=(
  "$WEB_DIR/index.html"
  "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"
  "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.css"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-theme-final.js"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-theme-final.css"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-ui-enhancements.js"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-ui-enhancements.css"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-globe-side.js"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-globe-side.css"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hr-quick-buttons.js"
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hr-quick-buttons.css"
  "$WEB_DIR/assets/opsai-robot.svg"
  "$WEB_DIR/assets/opsai-ai-orb.svg"
  "$WEB_DIR/assets/opsai-infrastructure.svg"
  "$WEB_DIR/assets/opsai-hr-team.svg"
  "$WEB_DIR/assets/opsai-approvals.svg"
  "$WEB_DIR/assets/opsai-globe-photo.png"
)

for required_file in "${required_files[@]}"; do
  if [[ ! -s "$required_file" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: Missing or empty final file:"
    echo "  $required_file"
    exit 1
  fi
done

node --check "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"
node --check "$WEB_DIR/opsai-theme-final.js"
node --check "$WEB_DIR/opsai-ui-enhancements.js"
node --check "$WEB_DIR/opsai-globe-side.js"
node --check "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hr-quick-buttons.js"

grep -q "Candidate View" "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"
grep -q "Manager View" "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"
grep -q "NEXT TECHNICAL ROUND" "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"
grep -q "CLIENT ROUND" "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"
grep -q "DOCUMENTS VERIFICATION" "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"
grep -q "OFFER RELEASE SOON" "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"
grep -q "OFFER RELEASED" "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"

grep -q "Infrastructure Assistant" "$WEB_DIR/opsai-ui-enhancements.js"
grep -q "HR Talent Assistant" "$WEB_DIR/opsai-ui-enhancements.js"
grep -q "Approval Assistant" "$WEB_DIR/opsai-ui-enhancements.js"
grep -q "OpsAI is thinking" "$WEB_DIR/opsai-ui-enhancements.js"

grep -q "opsai-globe-photo.png" "$WEB_DIR/opsai-globe-side.js"
grep -q "openDevOpsJobs" "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hr-quick-buttons.js"
grep -q "openDevOpsCandidates" "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hr-quick-buttons.js"
grep -q "stopImmediatePropagation" "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hr-quick-buttons.js"

grep -q "opsai-theme-final.css" "$WEB_DIR/index.html"
grep -q "opsai-ui-enhancements.css" "$WEB_DIR/index.html"
grep -q "opsai-globe-side.css" "$WEB_DIR/index.html"
grep -q "opsai-hr-quick-buttons.css" "$WEB_DIR/index.html"

grep -q "opsai-theme-final.js" "$WEB_DIR/index.html"
grep -q "opsai-ui-enhancements.js" "$WEB_DIR/index.html"
grep -q "opsai-globe-side.js" "$WEB_DIR/index.html"
grep -q "opsai-hr-quick-buttons.js" "$WEB_DIR/index.html"

if grep -qE \
  'opsai-world-map\.(css|js)|assets/opsai-world-map\.svg' \
  "$WEB_DIR/index.html"
then
  echo "ERROR: An old world-map reference is still present."
  exit 1
fi

AMPLIFY_APP_ID="${AMPLIFY_APP_ID:-}"

if [[ -z "$AMPLIFY_APP_ID" ]]; then
  AMPLIFY_APP_ID="$(aws amplify list-apps \
    --region "$AWS_REGION" \
    --query "apps[?name=='opsai-assistant-ui'].appId | [0]" \
    --output text)"
fi

if [[ -z "$AMPLIFY_APP_ID" || "$AMPLIFY_APP_ID" == "None" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Amplify application ID could not be resolved."
  exit 1
fi

AMPLIFY_BRANCH_NAME="${AMPLIFY_BRANCH_NAME:-main}"

DEFAULT_DOMAIN="$(aws amplify get-app \
  --app-id "$AMPLIFY_APP_ID" \
  --region "$AWS_REGION" \
  --query 'app.defaultDomain' \
  --output text)"

FINAL_URL="https://${AMPLIFY_BRANCH_NAME}.${DEFAULT_DOMAIN}"

LATEST_JOB_STATUS="$(aws amplify list-jobs \
  --app-id "$AMPLIFY_APP_ID" \
  --branch-name "$AMPLIFY_BRANCH_NAME" \
  --region "$AWS_REGION" \
  --max-results 1 \
  --query 'jobSummaries[0].status' \
  --output text)"

if [[ "$LATEST_JOB_STATUS" != "SUCCEED" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: The latest Amplify deployment is not successful."
  echo "Latest status: $LATEST_JOB_STATUS"
  exit 1
fi

echo "Final validation passed."
echo
echo "============================================================"
echo " Step 22 completed successfully"
echo "============================================================"
echo
echo "Final configuration:"
echo "  Hiring managers:       10"
echo "  Job requisitions:      20"
echo "  Candidate profiles:    40"
echo "  Sample applications:   40"
echo "  Hiring stages:         17"
echo "  Local AI/module images: 5"
echo "  Right-side globe:      Enabled"
echo "  Large world map:       Removed"
echo "  HR quick buttons:      Fixed"
echo
echo "Final website:"
echo "  $FINAL_URL"
echo
echo "Final test:"
echo "  1. Open the URL in an Incognito window."
echo "  2. Or press Ctrl + Shift + R."
echo "  3. Open New Chat."
echo "  4. Click 'Show internal cloud and DevOps job openings'."
echo "  5. Confirm Candidate View opens with DevOps search."
echo "  6. Return to New Chat."
echo "  7. Click 'Find DevOps candidates with around 10 years of experience'."
echo "  8. Confirm Manager View opens with DevOps and 6-10 years selected."
echo
